partnerRisk.title: Partner Risk Analysis
partnerRisk.subtitle: Consult real data from the Commercial Registry and Tax Authority to assess risk exposure of partner companies or clients. Data obtained via BizAPIs and analysed by AI.
partnerRisk.howItWorksDesc: Enter the NIF/NIPC to obtain tax data (name, VAT status, tax office). Optionally, add the CPRC Code (Permanent Commercial Registry Certificate) for complete data: shareholders, share capital, CAE, representatives and lien alerts.
partnerRisk.disclaimer: AI-generated analysis based on Commercial Registry and Tax Authority data on {{date}}. This report is for informational purposes only.
partnerRisk.emptyState: Enter a company's NIF to start the analysis
partnerRisk.emptyStateHint: The report includes tax identification, corporate structure, risk alerts and insurance recommendations suited to the company's profile.

licensePlates.emptyState: Enter a license plate to look up vehicle data.
licensePlates.emptyStateHint: Add a date to also obtain insurance information.

landing.heroDesc: Adler Pro is Portugal's first business insurance management portal with integrated Artificial Intelligence. Centralise policies, automate comparisons, manage claims and anticipate renewals — all on a single platform.
landing.problemTitle: Business insurance management is stuck in the past.
landing.problem1: Policies scattered across dozens of emails and folders
landing.problem2: Renewals that go unnoticed until it's too late
landing.problem3: Quote comparison done manually in Excel
landing.problem6: Zero integration between broker and company
landing.solutionTitle: Adler Pro transforms the way your company manages insurance.
landing.solution1: All policies centralised in a secure, accessible portal
landing.solution2: Automatic renewal alerts at 90, 60 and 30 days
landing.solution3: AI that reads, interprets and compares quotes in seconds
landing.solution4: Claims registration and tracking with timeline
landing.solution5: Partner risk analysis with Commercial Registry data
landing.solution6: Dedicated portal connecting the company to the broker
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your company needs. On one platform.
landing.featuresDesc: From the policy portfolio to claims management, each module was designed to solve a real day-to-day business problem.
landing.feat1Desc: Centralise all your company's policies. View coverages, premiums, renewal dates and associated documents in one place.
landing.feat2Desc: Upload the policy PDF and Artificial Intelligence automatically extracts all data: insurer, coverages, premiums, dates and conditions.
landing.feat3Desc: Compare up to 3 quotes simultaneously. AI analyses coverages, exclusions, deductibles and price, generating a detailed report with a recommendation.
landing.feat4Desc: Register and track claims for workplace accidents, property, fleet, liability and more. Progress timeline, type filters and CSV export.
landing.feat5Desc: Analyse the financial risk of partners and suppliers with data from the Tax Authority and Commercial Registry. Share capital, shareholders, alerts.
landing.feat6Desc: Receive automatic renewal alerts at 90, 60 and 30 days by email. Geolocated weather alerts linked to IPMA.
landing.iaTitle: The AI that works for your company.
landing.iaDesc: Adler Pro integrates advanced Artificial Intelligence models that automate tasks that previously consumed hours of administrative work. It's not a chatbot. It's a document analysis engine trained for the insurance context.
landing.iaFeat1Desc: Upload a policy PDF or image. AI extracts insurer, coverages, premiums, dates and conditions in seconds.
landing.iaFeat2Desc: Submit up to 3 quotes. AI compares coverages, exclusions and price, and generates a report with a reasoned recommendation.
landing.iaFeat3Desc: Enter a partner's NIF. AI cross-references Commercial Registry data and generates a financial risk profile.
landing.advantagesTitle: The competitive edge your company was missing.
landing.before1: Policies in shared emails and folders
landing.before2: Renewals forgotten or rushed at the last minute
landing.before6: Total dependence on the broker for any query
landing.after2: Automatic alerts at 90, 60 and 30 days by email
landing.after3: Intelligent comparison with AI report in seconds
landing.after4: Claims management with timeline and export
landing.after5: Risk analysis with Commercial Registry data
landing.after6: Dedicated portal with full autonomy for the company
landing.sectorsTitle: Regardless of sector, your insurance deserves intelligent management.
landing.sectorsMore: Construction, restaurants, retail, transport, healthcare, technology — Adler Pro adapts to any business sector.
landing.aboutTitle: Adler & Rochefort is a Portuguese insurtech.
landing.aboutP1: Registered with the Insurance and Pension Funds Supervisory Authority (ASF) under no. 425591790/3, Adler & Rochefort combines insurance brokerage expertise with cutting-edge technology to offer Portuguese companies a risk management experience that does not exist in the market.
landing.aboutP2: Adler Pro is not just a tool — it is the materialisation of our vision that the protection of business assets should be transparent, intelligent and, above all, simple.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your company's insurance management?
landing.ctaDesc: Request a free demo and discover how Adler Pro can simplify your operations, reduce risk and save your team time.
landing.footerCompany: Adler & Rochefort is a trading name of Ownizo Unipessoal LDA.

weatherAlerts.title: Weather Alerts
weatherAlerts.subtitle: Check weather forecasts by location to assess meteorological risk associated with insured properties and assets. Data provided by IPMA.
weatherAlerts.locationPlaceholder: E.g.: Lisbon, Porto, Faro, Braga, Funchal...
weatherAlerts.riskBasedon: Assessment based on today's forecast for {{name}}. For detailed analysis, consult the meteorological history and local conditions of the insured property or asset.
weatherAlerts.emptyTitle: Search a location to see the forecast
weatherAlerts.emptyHint: Suggestions: Lisbon, Porto, Faro, Braga, Coimbra, Funchal, Ponta Delgada
weatherAlerts.certSubtitle: Official documents for claims with insurers
weatherAlerts.certWhatDesc: A meteorological certificate is an official document issued by IPMA (Portuguese Institute for Sea and Atmosphere) that attests to the climatic conditions verified on a specific date and location.
weatherAlerts.certUseDesc: It is required by insurers as proof of a meteorological event in claims for storm, hail, strong wind, flooding or fallen trees. Without this document, the insurer may reject or delay compensation.
weatherAlerts.certHow2: Select "Certificates and Declarations" as the subject
weatherAlerts.certHow3: Indicate the date, time and location of the event
weatherAlerts.certHow4: Describe the type of phenomenon (wind, hail, etc.)
weatherAlerts.certHow5: Wait for a response within 5–10 working days
weatherAlerts.certRedirect: You will be redirected to the official IPMA form in a new window.
weatherAlerts.certWarning: Important: Request the certificate as soon as possible after the event. IPMA may not have detailed records for very old dates. Always keep the case number assigned by IPMA for follow-up.
weatherAlerts.locationNotFound: Location "{{name}}" not found. Try with the district name (e.g.: Lisbon, Porto, Faro) or select a suggestion.
